steps.title: Substitute the known quantity into the equation
steps.content:
Since there are 8 Rosa sericea flowers, substitute $x = 8$ into the equation:
$$4(8) + 5y = 77$$

steps.title: Solve for the number of Rosa caesia flowers
steps.content:
Simplify and isolate $y$:
$$32 + 5y = 77$$
$$5y = 45$$
$$y = 9$$
Verify: $4(8) + 5(9) = 32 + 45 = 77$ ✓

There are 9 Rosa caesia flowers. That matches choice D — D is correct.
